content:
- Completed task 10b end-to-end from NOW EXECUTE: replaced DCS etcd poll-diff worker path with real etcd watch-stream ingestion (`get(prefix)` bootstrap + `watch(prefix, start_revision=header+1)`), added timeout mapping for connect/get/watch/put/delete, and made watch cancel/compaction force unhealthy + reconnect/resnapshot.
- Upgraded src/dcs/etcd_store.rs real integration tests to use require_etcd_bin_for_real_tests() policy and added real `step_once` coverage (watch-path refresh without mock + malformed JSON decode causing faulted/not-trusted DCS state), plus unreachable endpoint IO mapping robustness.
- Ran full required gates sequentially with evidence logs in .ralph/evidence/10b-dcs-real-etcd3-store-adapter-and-tests/gates; first focused build hit known stale archive artifact and was resolved by `cargo clean`, final required rerun passed: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint.
- Updated task file to done with all acceptance checkboxes checked and `<passes>true</passes>` + `<passing>true</passing>`, added a new etcd watch/reconnect learning to AGENTS.md, and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh.
- Next step before handing off: commit all tracked/untracked task artifacts (including .ralph evidence/progress updates) with required message format and include gate evidence/challenge summary in commit body.

- Loaded .ralph progress memory for Choose-Task at startup; no prior output was returned.
- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md fully and applied the selection rules in order: bug-first, priority tags, story-chain, and meta-task precedence.
- Confirmed there are no failing bug tasks (<passes>false</passes> or <passing>false</passing>) in .ralph/tasks/bugs.
- Identified non-bug false tasks; the highest-priority unblocked candidate is `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/11-task-typed-pg-config-and-conninfo-roundtrip-tests.md` with <priority>high</priority>.
- Wrote that exact path into .ralph/current_task.txt and verified file contents.
- Next immediate step for the next agent: execute task 11 implementation work and preserve no-unwrap/no-panic policy.

- Opened prior progress memory, read `.ralph/current_task.txt`, and confirmed active task is `11-task-typed-pg-config-and-conninfo-roundtrip-tests.md`.
- Verified task phase was initial planning (no `TO BE VERIFIED`/`NOW EXECUTE` marker yet), so I performed planning-only work.
- Ran broad parallel exploration across pginfo/process/ha/dcs/debug/config modules to map all `PgConfig` and raw conninfo callsites and constraints; confirmed strict no-unwrap/no-expect lint policy remains active.
- Added a full Draft 1 execution plan to the task file under `<execution_plan>`, including concrete typed models (`PgConnInfo`, `PgSslMode`, typed `PgConfig` fields), strict parser/renderer rules, migration points, and explicit test/gate sequencing.
- Appended `TO BE VERIFIED` exactly at the end of the task file and intentionally stopped before any implementation changes, per workflow.
- Next engineer step: perform deep skeptical verification pass, alter at least one plan item, then replace the marker with `NOW EXECUTE` only when fully confident.
